contract: {rating, notes} — exactly two keys, rating int 0-100, notes non-empty, one bare JSON object
comment: schema_cases run with NO model (pure Python via security_spec.schema_ok) and MUST pass exactly as marked — the deterministic forcing function for output shape. band_cases are the labeled held-out examples; the runner checks the reference oracle lands in band (a known-good baseline) and that an empty emission scores 0.0 (cannot saturate). A live agent's recorded outputs can be checked the same way once a run exists. Prose is never compared.

output.notes: No problems found through the security lens; no change needed.
user_id is concatenated straight into the SQL string, so an attacker controlling user_id reaches the query as a SQL-injection sink; bind it as a parameter (db.execute(sql, (user_id,))) to reach 100.
a hard-coded secret is exposed; load it from the environment instead

band_cases.input_code: db.execute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = " + user_id)
